titles.en: Oppression's consequences outweigh its temporary dominance

text: ٢٤١. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): يَوْمُ الْمَظْلُومِ عَلَى الظَّالِمِ أَشدُّ مِنْ يَوْمِ الظَّالِمِ عَلَى الْمَظْلُومِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 241. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The day of the oppressed over the oppressor will be severer than the day of the oppressor over the oppressed. [1]
